result.stderr:
Usage: analyzer-tool <filePath|pattern> [options]
Options:
  --format, -f <format>              Output format (json, html, html-tree). Default: json
  --output-dir, -o <directory>       Output directory for multi-file reports
  --project-name, -p <name>          Project name for reports
  --cyclomatic-threshold <number>    Cyclomatic complexity threshold. Default: 10
  --cognitive-threshold <number>     Cognitive complexity threshold. Default: 15
  --minimum-maintainability <number> Minimum maintainability index. Default: none

Examples:
  Single file: analyzer-tool MyClass.cs --format html
  Multiple files: analyzer-tool "src/**/*.cs" --output-dir reports --format html-tree
  Custom thresholds: analyzer-tool MyClass.cs --cyclomatic-threshold 15 --cognitive-threshold 20

commands.payload:
